name: @axiom/game
description: Axiom Phaser-style TypeScript authoring SDK: write a whole game in TypeScript (createGame, onFixedUpdate, onRender, the Scene shell) while the deterministic native core (apps/axiom-game-runtime, wasm) runs the fixed-step loop. The stable authoring boundary every subsystem spec projects through.

scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run colocation && npm run coverage
